claims.summary: The telemetry subscriber has explicit lifecycle, reconnect, backoff, and shutdown behavior.
claims.disposition: Verify the loop and state-recording calls in current source.

claims.summary: Artifact scanning is bounded by a 1,200-second window and 30-second minimum refresh interval.
claims.disposition: Verify cached-scan reuse and failure fallback from current source.

claims.summary: Telemetry decoding has additive protocol compatibility rather than an unguarded hardcoded schema assumption.
claims.disposition: Verify incompatible packets are rejected while the last valid sample remains intact.

claims.summary: Observation mapping, pipeline timing, state update, SQLite logging, and trace persistence are complete.
claims.disposition: Verify the full handler and focused heartbeat regression; classify the apparent gap as a truncated-source misread.
